items.title: OpenWorldLib: A Unified Codebase and Definition of Advanced World Models
items.summary: Researchers introduce OpenWorldLib, a new unified codebase and definition aimed at advancing the development and understanding of world models in AI.

items.title: Firmus, the Nvidia-backed AI data center builder, hits $5.5B valuation
items.summary: Firmus, an AI data center construction company known for its 'Southgate' project and backed by Nvidia, has achieved a significant $5.5 billion valuation.

items.title: Intel signs on to Elon Musk's Terafab chips project
items.summary: Intel has joined Elon Musk's ambitious Terafab chips project, signaling a major collaboration in the semiconductor and AI hardware industry.

items.title: Project Glasswing: Anthropic's Initiative for Securing Critical AI Software
items.summary: Anthropic launches Project Glasswing, a new initiative focused on enhancing the security of critical software systems for the AI era.

items.title: Google's Search Live is expanding globally
items.summary: Google announces the global expansion of its 'Search Live' feature, likely integrating more real-time AI-powered information into search results.

items.title: MinerU2.5-Pro: Pushing the Limits of Data-Centric Document Parsing at Scale
items.summary: A new paper introduces MinerU2.5-Pro, a system designed to significantly improve the efficiency and scale of data-centric document parsing.

items.title: OpenAI Helps Disaster Response Teams Turn AI into Action Across Asia
items.summary: OpenAI is collaborating with disaster response teams in Asia to implement AI solutions for more effective and rapid humanitarian aid efforts.

items.title: TriAttention: Efficient Long Reasoning with Trigonometric KV Compression
items.summary: New research presents TriAttention, a method utilizing trigonometric key-value compression to enable more efficient long-context reasoning in AI models.

items.title: GrandCode: Achieving Grandmaster Level in Competitive Programming via Agentic Reinforcement Learning
items.summary: Researchers introduce GrandCode, an AI system that leverages agentic reinforcement learning to reach grandmaster proficiency in competitive programming.

items.title: Goose Offers Free Alternative to Claude Code's $200/Month Service
items.summary: A new tool called Goose is positioned as a free alternative to Claude Code, offering similar functionalities for developers without the monthly subscription cost.

items.title: Hazmat: OS-level containment for AI coding agents on macOS
items.summary: Hazmat is an open-source project providing OS-level containment solutions for AI coding agents running on macOS, enhancing security and isolation.

items.title: I can't help rooting for tiny open source AI model maker Arcee
items.summary: TechCrunch highlights Arcee, a small open-source AI model maker, praising its efforts and potential impact in the competitive AI landscape.

items.title: The creator of Claude Code just revealed his workflow, and developers are losing their minds
items.summary: The workflow of Claude Code's creator has been unveiled, generating significant excitement and discussion among the developer community.

items.title: Adam's Law: Textual Frequency Law on Large Language Models
items.summary: A new paper proposes Adam's Law, a textual frequency law that describes patterns observed in large language models.

items.title: AURA: Always-On Understanding and Real-Time Assistance via Video Streams
items.summary: Researchers introduce AURA, a system designed for continuous understanding and real-time assistance by processing live video streams.
